liquibase.hub.core

implements HubService

      • getHubChangeLog

        public HubChangeLog getHubChangeLog(UUID changeLogId)
                             throws LiquibaseHubException
        Query for a changelog ID. If no result we return null We cache this result and a map
        Specified by:
        getHubChangeLog in interface HubService
        Parameters:
        changeLogId - Changelog ID for query
        Returns:
        HubChangeLog Object container for result
        Throws:
        LiquibaseHubException

      • getHubChangeLog

        public HubChangeLog getHubChangeLog(UUID changeLogId,
                                    String includeStatus)
        Query for a changelog ID. If no result we return null We cache this result and a map
        Specified by:
        getHubChangeLog in interface HubService
        Parameters:
        changeLogId - Changelog ID for query
        includeStatus - Allowable status for returned changelog
        Returns:
        HubChangeLog Object container for result
        Throws:
        LiquibaseHubException

      • toSearchString

        protected String toSearchString(HubModel object)
        Converts an object to a search string. Any properties with non-null values are used as search arguments. If a HubModel has an id specified, only that value is used in the search.
